prompt:
Scene:
A polished Prompt Atlas production image for the theme Long-Exposure Light Painting. Build a finished, gallery-ready visual demonstration rather than a generic mood board. The setting should be specific, coherent, and immediately readable, with lighting, viewpoint, and environment chosen to support a practical applied system.

Subject:
Create applied system as a self-contained image that demonstrates Long-Exposure Light Painting. The main subject should occupy the visual center of gravity, with clear supporting details around it. Use the theme's capability focus: credible real-world light, texture, and camera behavior.

Important details:
High production value, precise composition, clean hierarchy, crop-safe framing, and no unrelated filler. Make the visual evidence of the theme visible at thumbnail size and still rewarding in close inspection. Use believable materials, intentional color contrast, and consistent design language across all elements.

Use case:
Independent single-image study in Prompt Atlas, intended for a gallery card and detail modal. It should prove the theme direction before deeper series production.

Constraints:
No watermark, no real brand logo, no private data, no temporary URLs, no task ids, no messy extra panels, no unreadable clutter, no accidental duplicate main subjects, preserve exact 16:9 aspect ratio.
title: Applied System
description: Applied System is an independent study for the Long-Exposure Light Painting theme.

generation.runner_notes: Independent prompted image; no reference URL required.
